import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-settings', templateUrl: './settings.component.html', styleUrls: ['./settings.component.css'] }) export class SettingsComponent { settingsItems = [ { icon: '🔐', label: 'Account' }, { icon: '🔒', label: 'Privacy and security' }, { icon: '🤝', label: 'Moderation' }, { icon: '🔔', label: 'Notifications' }, { icon: '🖼️', label: 'Content and media' }, { icon: '🎨', label: 'Appearance' }, { icon: '♿', label: 'Accessibility' }, { icon: '🌐', label: 'Languages' }, { icon: '❓', label: 'Help' }, { icon: 'ℹ️', label: 'About' }, ]; constructor(private router: Router) {} goBack() { this.router.navigate(['/home']); } logout() { this.router.navigate(['/']); } }
Settings
